provenance.source: Hand-authored negative control: a Markdown table of data returned as the answer, with no tool intent.

request_tools.name: create_record
request_tools.description: Insert a row into a table.

raw_output:
Here are the three rows you asked about:

| id | name  |
|----|-------|
| 1  | Ada   |
| 2  | Linus |
| 3  | Grace |

Let me know if you want them exported.
note: The structured data is the answer to the user's question, not arguments for create_record. There is no call to recover; building one would invent table and values. no_tool is correct.
